2026-04-14T07:19:51.3193750Z [hash-debug] Frontmatter text (2075 chars):
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3194766Z ---
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3196719Z description: |
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3204008Z   Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3214789Z   Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3218205Z   gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3220090Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3220434Z on:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3221624Z   push:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3222850Z     branches: [main]
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3224969Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3226182Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3226551Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3228078Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3228439Z network: defaults
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3229008Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3229338Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3230599Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3231722Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3234221Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3234852Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3235224Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3235667Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3236029Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3242374Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3269029Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3269647Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3270136Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3271189Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3271594Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3271999Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3276777Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3277229Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3277771Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3278255Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3278893Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3279658Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3280015Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3281521Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3282178Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3282885Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3303558Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3317763Z               }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3318113Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3318658Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3319427Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3319945Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3320381Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3321690Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3323105Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3324031Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3325427Z               }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3325661Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3326131Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3326738Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3329165Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3330145Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3331031Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3331569Z               });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3332048Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);

2026-04-14T07:19:51.3571492Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3572846Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3578283Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3581293Z   create-issue:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3582530Z     max: 1
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3583257Z   noop:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3585425Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3585865Z   jobs:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3589491Z     dispatch_triage:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3596374Z       description: "Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3597650Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3598121Z       needs: safe_outputs
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3599097Z       output: "Triage workflow dispatched"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3601723Z       permissions:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3607972Z         actions: write
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3611228Z         issues: write
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3621354Z       steps:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3628569Z         - name: Dispatch triage workflow
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3629218Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3630522Z           env:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3631132Z             CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}"
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3631861Z           with:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3632222Z             script: |
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3632765Z               const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3634426Z               if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3636463Z                 core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3638890Z                 return;
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3639319Z               }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3639545Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3639777Z               const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3640602Z               const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3641119Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3641561Z               const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3642406Z               if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3643248Z                 await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3644509Z                 core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3645135Z               }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3645347Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3645626Z               await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3646217Z                 ...repo,
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3646680Z                 workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3647200Z                 ref: 'main',
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3647677Z                 inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3648193Z               });
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3648668Z               core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3649099Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3649245Z tools:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3649588Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3649933Z   github:
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3650299Z     toolsets: [issues, repos]
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3650589Z 
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3650760Z timeout-minutes: 15
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3651764Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3652464Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (2168 chars):
2026-04-14T07:19:51.3673754Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Documentation gap detector for the Azure SDK repository\n  Triggered on every push to main, analyzes diffs to identify documentation\n  gaps and files GitHub issues for Copilot coding agent to implement\n\non:\n  push:\n    branches: [main]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork: defaults\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  create-issue:\n    max: 1\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    dispatch_triage:\n      description: \"Dispatch the issue triage workflow for the newly created issue\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      needs: safe_outputs\n      output: \"Triage workflow dispatched\"\n      permissions:\n        actions: write\n        issues: write\n      steps:\n        - name: Dispatch triage workflow\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ needs.safe_outputs.outputs.created_issue_number }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const issueNumber = process.env.CREATED_ISSUE_NUMBER;\n              if (!issueNumber || issueNumber === '') {\n                core.info('No issue was created; skipping triage dispatch');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const issueNum = parseInt(issueNumber, 10);\n              const repo = { owner: context.repo.owner, repo: context.repo.repo };\n\n              const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.get({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum });\n              if (issue.labels && issue.labels.length > 0) {\n                await github.rest.issues.setLabels({ ...repo, issue_number: issueNum, labels: [] });\n                core.info(`Removed all labels from issue #${issueNum}`);\n              }\n\n              await github.rest.actions.createWorkflowDispatch({\n                ...repo,\n                workflow_id: 'issue-triage.lock.yml',\n                ref: 'main',\n                inputs: { issue_number: issueNumber }\n              });\n              core.info(`Dispatched triage for issue #${issueNum}`);\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues, repos]\n\ntimeout-minutes: 15"}
